<?php namespace {{ namespace }}; use {{ namespacedModel }}; use {{ rootNamespace }}Http\Controllers\Controller; use {{ namespacedRequests }} class {{ class }} extends Controller { /** * Display a listing of the resource. */ public function index() { // } /** * Store a newly created resource in storage. */ public function store({{ storeRequest }} $request) { // } /** * Display the specified resource. */ public function show({{ model }} ${{ modelVariable }}) { // } /** * Update the specified resource in storage. */ public function update({{ updateRequest }} $request, {{ model }} ${{ modelVariable }}) { // } /** * Remove the specified resource from storage. */ public function destroy({{ model }} ${{ modelVariable }}) { // } }
